chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Constitutional Petition No. D-799 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on office objection. 2. For order on M.A No. 765/ 2024. 3. For hearing of main case. 15-04-2026. Mr. Ghulam Nabi Meo advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi, A.A.G a/w Mr. Khan Muhammad, XEN Mithrao Division, and Mr. Naimat Ali, Assistant Executive Engineer, Naukot (Respondents No.4 and 5). = Learned A.A.G has filed compliance report of the respondents No.4 and 5 under the cover of statement, which is taken on record. Mr. Khan Muhammad, XEN Mithrao Division, and Mr. Naimat Ali, Assistant Executive Engineer Naukot (Respondents No.4 and 5), who are present in Court, state that original position of water course No.3L/Ex-Sehri Minor has been restored strictly in accordance with the sanctioned design, and all the obstructions have been removed and the petitioner will receive his due share of water for agricultural land bearing Block Nos. 222 and 223 of Deh Seri, Taluka Jhudo, District Mirpurkhas. Learned counsel for the petitioner expresses his satisfaction on the undertaking furnished by the respondents No.4 and 5. Hence, instant Petition alongwith listed pending application stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Saleem*
